description_long: This is an upright piano with a rectangular, blocky form and a dark brown wooden finish, featuring a pixelated texture reminiscent of retro or voxel art styles. The front side displays a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and two gold-colored pedals are visible beneath the keyboard. The piano's top and side panels are solid, with subtle wood grain patterns and no visible decorative carvings or embellishments. The back panel is plain and unadorned, matching the rest of the piano's wood texture. The overall construction appears sturdy and functional, suitable for placement in public or semi-public urban spaces such as parks, plazas, or community centers. The piano lacks a visible brand or logo and does not have a music stand attached.
description: A dark brown upright piano with a pixelated wood texture, full keyboard, and two gold pedals. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional, with no visible brand or music stand.
description_view_0: The back of the piano, showing a plain, flat wooden panel with subtle pixelated wood grain.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the piano's depth, solid side panel, and a partial view of the keyboard and pedals.
description_view_2: The front of the piano, displaying the full keyboard, two gold pedals, and the main playing area.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and a partial view of the keyboard.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard piano keyboard with alternating white and black keys, approximately 36 keys visible, evenly spaced with no missing or non-standard keys.
